about.metaTitle: About | Hua Teng Engineering — Class A Licensed Electricians
about.metaDescription: Hua Teng Engineering is based in Daxi, Taoyuan and holds the Class A Indoor-Wiring Technician license — Taiwan's highest indoor wiring certification. Learn our story and what Class A means for you.
about.title: We fix every home like it's our own
about.lead: Rooted in Daxi, Taoyuan, Hua Teng Engineering serves homes and businesses with Class A certified professionalism — from emergency call-outs to full renovations.
about.storyP1: Hua Teng Engineering is based in Daxi, Taoyuan, serving homes and storefronts across the area. From an urgent midnight leak to planning a complete rewire of an older house, we believe good work comes down to two things: solid craftsmanship and honesty with customers.
about.storyP2: Clear quotes, showing up when we say we will, and leaving the site clean — these basics are exactly why more than 60 customers have left us five-star reviews.
about.storyNote: (Draft company story — to be finalized with the owner)
about.certTitle: What is a Class A Indoor-Wiring Technician?
about.certP1: Taiwan's indoor-wiring technician license has three levels — Class A (甲級), B (乙級), and C (丙級) — and Class A is the highest. Earning it requires passing the most demanding written and practical exams, covering high/low-voltage distribution, industrial wiring, and complex circuit design.
about.certP2: In practice, Class A licenses are typically held only by vocational instructors or master electricians running their own engineering firms — most field technicians hold Class B or C.
about.certWhyTitle: What does that mean for you?
about.certWhy1: Wiring is designed and checked by the highest-certified level, reducing risks of leakage current and electrical fire.
about.certWhy2: Work follows Taiwan's indoor wiring regulations — solid ground for inspections, insurance, and future property sales.
about.certWhy3: Diagnosis and repair by the same expert team — no subcontracting layers, no repeat call-backs.
about.teamLead: Real team photos and bios are being prepared and will be added soon.
about.teamRole1Desc: Oversees project planning and wiring quality, personally checking every job.
about.teamRole2Desc: Handles on-site repairs and installations — experienced, meticulous, and tidy.
about.ctaTitle: Looking for a team you can trust?
about.ctaText: On-site survey, same-day quote, Class A certified quality.
